query:
insert into TestCaseLineCoverage (
                            last_collect_nr,
                            product_id,
                            test_run_name,
                            test_run_date,
                            test_case_name,
                            cov_filepath,
                            cov_file_hash,
                            cov_line,
                            hits
                        )
                        values (
                            $1,
                            $2,
                            $3,
                            $4,
                            $5,
                            $6,
                            $7,
                            $8,
                            $9
                        )
                        on conflict (
                            product_id,
                            test_run_name,
                            test_run_date,
                            test_case_name,
                            cov_filepath,
                            cov_line
                        )
                        do update set
                            last_collect_nr = excluded.last_collect_nr,
                            hits = excluded.hits
